name: Dishwater Punch
recipeInstructions:
1. Ensure all Kool-Aid is pre-sweetened 2-quart packages.
2. Mix all dry mixes together.
3. Add water and juices to the mixture.
4. Stir well until everything is combined.
5. Add food coloring until the drink looks visually appealing.
- For guests with sensitive eyes, you may need a significant amount of color (up to a whole large bottle).
